title: Creamy Fresh Ukrainian Mincemeat Pierogi
description: A delicious and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring a fresh and creamy filling made with mincemeat and served in a double-rise bread.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the mincemeat, sour cream, granulated sugar, egg, and vanilla extract. Mix until well combined.
Roll out the double-rise bread into a large rectangle, about 1/4-inch thick.
Cut the bread into 8 equal pieces, about 3 1/2 inches square.
Place a tablespoon of the mincemeat mixture onto one half of each bread piece, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the bread over the filling and press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the unsalted butter.
Add the pierogi to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the pierogi hot with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of granulated sugar.
If desired, serve with a side of fruit or a light salad.
